evals.prompt: Run an accessibility audit on a checkout form page
evals.expected_output: WCAG 2.2 compliance report with contrast, label, and heading issues

evals.prompt: Test keyboard navigation for a modal dialog component
evals.expected_output: Focus trap validation with Tab order and Escape key behavior

evals.prompt: Screen reader compatibility check for a data table with sort controls
evals.expected_output: ARIA role and live region audit with fix recommendations
